averageAmountPerGood_formula.tex_statement: \forall {Item : Type u_1} [inst : DecidableEq Item] (b : SingleMindedBid Item), averageAmountPerGood b = value / bundleSize

averageGreedyAcceptedSet_formula.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
averageGreedyAcceptedSet_formula.tex_statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_2 : DecidableEq Item] [inst_3 : LinearOrder Bidder] (bids : Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item), averageGreedyAcceptedSet bids = greedyAcceptedFromOrder bids (averageOrderOf bids)

averageGreedyPayment_formula.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
averageGreedyPayment_formula.tex_statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_2 : DecidableEq Item] [inst_3 : LinearOrder Bidder] (bids : Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item) (j : Bidder), averageGreedyPayment bids j = if j \in averageGreedyAcceptedSet bids then match paper_greedy_next_denied_from_order bids (averageOrderOf bids) j with | none  =>  0 | some n  =>  (bids j).bundleSize * (bids n).averageAmountPerGood else 0

averageOrderOf_rule.tex_statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Item] [inst_2 : LinearOrder Bidder] (bids : Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item), (averageOrderOf bids).Nodup \land (\forall (i : Bidder), i \in averageOrderOf bids) \land SingleMindedAverageAmountDescending bids (averageOrderOf bids)

generalizedVickreyAuction_allocation_pay.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
generalizedVickreyAuction_allocation_pay.tex_statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Bidder] (alloc : CombinatorialReport Bidder Item \to BundleAllocation Bidder Item) (reports : CombinatorialReport Bidder Item) (i : Bidder), (generalizedVickreyAuction alloc).allocation reports = alloc reports \land (generalizedVickreyAuction alloc).payment reports i = allocationValueExcept reports (alloc (reportsWithoutBidder reports i)) i - allocationValueExcept reports (alloc reports) i

greedyAcceptedFromOrder_formula.tex_statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Item] (bids : Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item) (order : List Bidder), greedyAcceptedFromOrder bids order = foldl (singleMindedGreedyStep bids) \varnothing order

lemma9_1_exists_nonnegative_critical_val.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
lemma9_1_exists_nonnegative_critical_val.tex_statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Item] (M : SingleMindedAcceptedMechanism Bidder Item), MonotonicityOn nonnegativeNonemptySingleMindedProfile \to \forall (reports : Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item), nonnegativeNonemptySingleMindedProfile reports \to \forall (i : Bidder) (s : Finset Item), Nonempty \to (\exists c, 0 \le c \land (\forall (v : ℝ), 0 \le v \to v < c \to i ∉ accepted (update reports i { desired := s, value := v })) \land \forall (v : ℝ), 0 \le v \to c < v \to i \in accepted (update reports i { desired := s, value := v })) \lor \forall (v : ℝ), 0 \le v \to i ∉ accepted (update reports i { desired := s, value := v })

theorem6_1_external_approximation_solver.tex_statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} {Language : Type u_3} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Item] (factor : ℝ) (complexityModel : ComplexityClassModel Language) (FeasibleSM : ((Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item) \to Finset Bidder) \to Prop) (FeasibleWSP : ((Bidder \to Finset Item) \to (Bidder \to ℝ) \to Finset Bidder) \to Prop) (solver : (Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item) \to Finset Bidder), singleMindedApproximationSolverAtLeast factor solver \to FeasibleSM solver \to (FeasibleSM solver \to FeasibleWSP (setPackingSolverOfSingleMindedSolver solver)) \to (\forall (wspSolver : (Bidder \to Finset Item) \to (Bidder \to ℝ) \to Finset Bidder), weightedSetPackingApproximationSolverAtLeast factor wspSolver \to FeasibleWSP wspSolver \to npEqZPP) \to npEqZPP

theorem6_1_weighted_set_packing_reductio.tex_statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Item] (sets : Bidder \to Finset Item) (weights : Bidder \to ℝ) (selected : Finset Bidder), weightedSetPackingOptimal sets weights selected \iff singleMindedOptimalAcceptedSet (setPackingSingleMindedBids sets weights) selected

theorem7_2_sqrt_norm_approx_of_sorted_or.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
theorem7_2_sqrt_norm_approx_of_sorted_or.tex_statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Item] [Inhabited Bidder] [Inhabited Item] (bids : Bidder \to SingleMindedBid Item) (optimal : Finset Bidder) (goods : Finset Item) (order : List Bidder), (\forall i \in optimal, (bids i).desired \subseteq goods) \to PairwiseDisjointDesired bids optimal \to (\forall i \in optimal, Nonempty (bids i).desired) \to (\forall i \in greedyAcceptedFromOrder bids order, Nonempty (bids i).desired) \to (\forall i \in optimal, 0 \le (bids i).value) \to (\forall i \in greedyAcceptedFromOrder bids order, 0 \le (bids i).value) \to SingleMindedSqrtNormDescending bids order \to (\forall i \in optimal, i \in order) \to singleMindedTotalValue bids optimal \le √↑card * singleMindedTotalValue bids (greedyAcceptedFromOrder bids order)

truthfulOn_iff.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
truthfulOn_iff.tex_statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} [inst : DecidableEq Bidder] (M : CombinatorialAuction Bidder Item) (admissible : CombinatorialReport Bidder Item \to Prop), truthfulOn M admissible \iff \forall (values : CombinatorialReport Bidder Item), admissible values \to \forall (i : Bidder) (report : Bundle Item \to ℝ), utility M values (update values i report) i \le utility M values values i

utility_formula.comment: Context-free Lean-to-TeX translation for the current PaperInterface row.
utility_formula.tex_statement: \forall {Bidder : Type u_1} {Item : Type u_2} (M : CombinatorialAuction Bidder Item) (values reports : CombinatorialReport Bidder Item) (i : Bidder), utility M values reports i = values i (allocation reports i) - payment reports i
